user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of recruitment email templates, so that I can see every configured email type
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When the list loads; Then each template shows its Template Type ID, Email type and Description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view an individual email template, so that I can inspect its content before it is used
acceptance_criteria: Given a template is listed; When I click View in the Task column; Then the template detail is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the template list, so that I can navigate all 34 templates
acceptance_criteria: Given more templates exist than fit on one page; When I use the pagination controls or Refresh; Then the next set of templates is shown
